codeReview.summary: Feature fix-l9-s7-content successfully expanded l9-s7 content from 1,855 chars to 5,975 chars. The expanded content thoroughly covers modern cache types (L1/L2/L3 caches), cache hierarchies in modern processors (Intel Core i7), and how caches fit into the overall memory hierarchy. Section ID (l9-s7), lectureId (9), title, concepts, examples, and assessmentItems are all preserved. Validation passed with 956/956 assertions.

summary: Review passed. l9-s7 content expanded from 1,855 to 5,975 characters (exceeds 2,000 requirement). Content now comprehensively covers L1/L2/L3 caches, Intel Core i7 cache hierarchy, separate i-cache vs d-cache trade-offs, unified caches, cache parameters (capacity, block size, associativity, write policy), and how caches fit into the overall memory hierarchy pyramid. Section metadata preserved. Validation passed.
